cancelOffer(uint256).details: Only callable by the original buyer, follows checks-effects-interactions pattern

params.offerId: ID of the offer to cancel

createOffer().details: Reuses cancelled offer slots when available, otherwise creates new slotSent ETH becomes the offer price locked in the contract

fulfillOffer(uint256,address,address,uin.details: Validates offer, pays seller, clears offer, then executes ZK-verified transfer

params._pA: ZK proof parameter A for re-encryption
params._pB: ZK proof parameter B for re-encryption
params._pC: ZK proof parameter C for re-encryption
params._pubSignals: Public signals for ZK proof including buyer's public key
params.from: Seller address (must be msg.sender and current token owner)
params.offerId: ID of the offer to fulfill

getOffers(uint256,uint256).details: Filters out cancelled offers (buyer == address(0)), returns resized arrays

returns.offerIds: Array of active offer IDs in the range

getOffersByAddress(address).details: Scans all offers and filters by buyer address, returns resized arrays

params.buyer: Address of the buyer to query offers for

returns.offerIds: Array of offer IDs created by the buyer

cancelOffer(uint256).notice: Cancels an existing offer and refunds the buyer

constructor.notice: Initializes the marketplace with the EncryptedERC721 contract address

currentOffers().notice: Counter for total offers created (including cancelled ones)

fulfillOffer(uint256,address,address,uin.notice: Fulfills an offer by selling an NFT to the buyer

getOffers(uint256,uint256).notice: Retrieves active offers within a specified range

getOffersByAddress(address).notice: Retrieves all active offers made by a specific buyer

offers(uint256).notice: Maps offer IDs to their corresponding offer details

pointerEmptyOffers(uint256).notice: Stack of cancelled offer IDs available for reuse
